response.justification: The candidate is a versatile senior full-stack developer with strong web/backend experience in TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang, plus some C/C++ exposure at National Instruments. However, the role requires 8 years of C++ programming and substantial large-scale infrastructure/distributed systems leadership in a cloud compute platform context, which the resume does not demonstrate. C++ work appears limited to a ~6-month stint in 2014-2015, and there is no evidence of formal technical leadership of cloud compute platforms or production cloud architecture at the required scale.
strengths: Broad multi-language full-stack experience across web, mobile, embedded
Strong software craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, mentoring via workshops
Experience with high-throughput systems at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic (millions of requests/sec)
concerns: Insufficient C++ experience — only ~6 months at National Instruments vs. 8 years required
No demonstrated technical leadership of cloud compute platforms or DevOps engineers
Limited evidence of large-scale distributed systems architecture ownership at required seniority

key_factors.factor: Lack of cloud compute platform leadership
Strong software craftsmanship and mentoring track record
